pageContext.name: Dragon’s Lullaby
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Kinetiquettes are proud to present the Dragon's Lullaby Diorama, from the K-Artists Series.  In a world where dragons are neither fought nor hunted, they are tamed by the melodies of music. The diorama depicts a serene mountain top where a musician plays the flute to calm the majestic dragon while surrounded by mystical creatures being curious. The scene is filled with details and easter eggs of Chinese culture paying homage to the mythical creatures of ancient times.  Designed with and sculpted by Maria Panfilova, this is the third statue in the K-Artists Series. For the first time ever, in collaboration with Imba Interactive, Kinetiquettes presents original music and ambient sound designed for a collectible.
